articles.title: Iran launches attacks on US army facilities in Bahrain, Jordan
articles.summary: Iran launches attacks on US army facilities in Bahrain, Jordan The Iranian army announced that it targeted US infrastructure in Jordan and Bahrain on Friday morning using drone strikes.  It targeted fuel tanks, warehouses and large equipment depots as well as barracks sheltering US troops at the Sheikh Isa Air Base in Bahrain. Meanwhile, an aircraft hangar and US army barracks were also targeted at the Jordanian al-Azraq Air Base.

articles.title: Malaysia envoy summoned by US over Israel stance
articles.summary: Malaysia envoy summoned by US over Israel stance The US  State Department summoned the Malaysian ambassador to Washington in order to explain Kuala Lumpur's position on Israel, state news agency Bernama reported. Foreign Minister Mohamad Hasan said Ambassador Muhammad Shahrul Ikram Yaakob told the State Department that the country's longstanding policy of not recognising Israel was not new. articles.title: US military says 13th consecutive night of attacks on Iran completed
articles.summary: US military says 13th consecutive night of attacks on Iran completed The US Central Command (Centcom) said it "completed" its latest wave of strikes against Iran for the 13th night in a row.  The attacks lasted more than two hours, with Centcom saying it targeted military command centers, drone storage facilities, communication networks, coastal surveillance sites and maritime capabilities.

articles.title: Eight Muslim countries denounce mass Israeli raid on Al-Aqsa
articles.summary: Eight Muslim countries denounce mass Israeli raid on Al-Aqsa The foreign ministers of Qatar, the UAE, Jordan, Turkey, Egypt, Indonesia, Pakistan, and Saudi Arabia have denounced recent Israeli settler incursions at Jerusalem's Al-Aqsa Mosque as "illegal and extremist acts". In a statement posted by Qatar's foreign ministry on X on Thursday, the ministers stressed that the storming of the holy sites constitute a "flagrant violation of international law, relevant United Nations resolutions, and the historic and legal status quo at the holy sites in Occupied East Jerusalem". articles.title: Two injured in Bandar Abbas, more strikes heard in Iran
articles.summary: Two injured in Bandar Abbas, more strikes heard in Iran At least two people were injured in a recent US attack on the southern Iranian port city of Bandar Abbas, state media reported.  Further US strikes were also reported around the Omidiyeh and Andimeshk, both located south west of the country. This follows the US Central Command's announcement of launching attacks on Iran for the 13th consecutive night.
